div.p: van Emde Boas Layout ✓ O(log_B N) cache misses ✓ Parameter-free optimality ✓ Single allocation ✓ Best for read-heavy workloads
Trade-off: Amortized O(log_B N) lookups with batch rebuild cost
B-Tree (Tuned) ✓ O(log_B N) cache misses ✓ Efficient inserts/deletes ✗ Requires cache-line tuning
Node size = cache line size Branching factor = 16 (typical)
Pointer BST ✗ O(log N) cache misses (worst) ✓ Simple insert/delete ✓ Self-balancing variants ✓ Low implementation cost
B-Tree / B+Tree ✓ O(log_B N) cache misses ✓ Efficient bulk operations ✓ Range queries (B+Tree)
